title: Cheesy Ukrainian Pasta
description: A smooth and silky pasta dish inspired by Ukrainian cuisine, made with melted cheese and cooked to perfection.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add heavy cream and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add shredded cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Combine cooked pasta and cheese sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
